Name: Average time from Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE to Declaration FOR_APPROVAL by ADMINISTRATION
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE' and activity 'Declaration FOR_APPROVAL by ADMINISTRATION'

Name: Average time for Declaration FOR_APPROVAL by ADMINISTRATION
Metric: The average of the duration between activity Declaration FOR_APPROVAL by ADMINISTRATION and the end of the case

Name: Total time between Declaration FOR_APPROVAL by ADMINISTRATION and Declaration APPROVED by ADMINISTRATION
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Declaration FOR_APPROVAL by ADMINISTRATION' and activity 'Declaration APPROVED by ADMINISTRATION'

Name: Minimum time from Declaration FOR_APPROVAL by ADMINISTRATION to Declaration REJECTED by ADMINISTRATION
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'Declaration FOR_APPROVAL by ADMINISTRATION' and activity 'Declaration REJECTED by ADMINISTRATION'

Name: Average time it takes Declaration FOR_APPROVAL by ADMINISTRATION after the execution of Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE' and activity 'Declaration FOR_APPROVAL by ADMINISTRATION'

Name: Total waiting time to the Declaration FOR_APPROVAL by ADMINISTRATION
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity Declaration FOR_APPROVAL by ADMINISTRATION and the end of the case

Name: Average time between Declaration FOR_APPROVAL by ADMINISTRATION and Declaration APPROVED by PRE_APPROVER in variants involving pre-approval paths
Metric: The average of the duration between activity Declaration FOR_APPROVAL by ADMINISTRATION and activity Declaration APPROVED by PRE_APPROVER for cases where activity Declaration APPROVED by PRE_APPROVER occurs

Name: Minimum time for Declaration FOR_APPROVAL by ADMINISTRATION in cases that eventually lead to Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity Declaration FOR_APPROVAL by ADMINISTRATION and the end of the case

Name: Average time from Declaration FOR_APPROVAL by ADMINISTRATION to Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR in successful variants
Metric: The average of the duration between activity Declaration FOR_APPROVAL by ADMINISTRATION and activity Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR for cases where activity Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR occurs

Name: Total time between Declaration FOR_APPROVAL by ADMINISTRATION and Request Payment in variants without rejections
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Declaration FOR_APPROVAL by ADMINISTRATION' and activity 'Request Payment'

Name: Average time it takes Declaration FOR_APPROVAL by ADMINISTRATION to be followed by a rejection activity, specifically Declaration REJECTED by ADMINISTRATION
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration FOR_APPROVAL by ADMINISTRATION' and activity 'Declaration REJECTED by ADMINISTRATION'

Name: Minimum time between Declaration FOR_APPROVAL by ADMINISTRATION and Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER in variants where pre-approver rejection occurs
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity Declaration FOR_APPROVAL by ADMINISTRATION and activity Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER for cases where activity Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER occurs

Name: Average cycle time of Declaration FOR_APPROVAL by ADMINISTRATION grouped by case:BudgetNumber
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration FOR_APPROVAL by ADMINISTRATION' and the end of case grouped by the last value of case:BudgetNumber

Name: Total resolution time of Declaration FOR_APPROVAL by ADMINISTRATION in cases that undergo multiple submission-rejection cycles
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Declaration FOR_APPROVAL by ADMINISTRATION' and the end of case where activity 'Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE occurs

Name: Average time from Declaration FOR_APPROVAL by ADMINISTRATION to Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE in rework loops triggered by rejections
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration FOR_APPROVAL by ADMINISTRATION' and activity 'Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE'

Name: Minimum elapsed time between Declaration FOR_APPROVAL by ADMINISTRATION and the next occurrence of Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE when rejection leads to resubmission
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'Declaration FOR_APPROVAL by ADMINISTRATION' and activity 'Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE'

Name: Average time between Declaration FOR_APPROVAL by ADMINISTRATION and Declaration APPROVED by BUDGET OWNER in variants requiring budget owner approval
Metric: The average of the duration between activity Declaration FOR_APPROVAL by ADMINISTRATION and activity Declaration APPROVED by BUDGET OWNER for cases where activity Declaration APPROVED by BUDGET OWNER occurs

Name: Total time from Declaration FOR_APPROVAL by ADMINISTRATION to Payment Handled in end-to-end successful declarations
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity Declaration FOR_APPROVAL by ADMINISTRATION and activity Payment Handled for cases where activity Payment Handled occurs

Name: Average time it takes Declaration FOR_APPROVAL by ADMINISTRATION after Declaration SAVED by EMPLOYEE in cases where saving precedes formal submission
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration SAVED by EMPLOYEE' and activity 'Declaration FOR_APPROVAL by ADMINISTRATION'

Name: Minimum time for Declaration FOR_APPROVAL by ADMINISTRATION in variants that include Declaration FOR_APPROVAL by PRE_APPROVER as a subsequent or alternative step
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity Declaration FOR_APPROVAL by ADMINISTRATION and the end of the case
